error_string: [ERROR] AttachSchemaTransformer: No provider config schema available for provider["terraform.io/builtin/terraform"]

required_files.rationale: The builtin terraform provider implementation. Fix either returns an empty config schema or changes the log level. The error is triggered because this provider returns no config schema.
Test file updated in fix PR.

sufficient_files.rationale: Contains the AttachSchemaTransformer that logs the ERROR. Understanding the caller helps trace the error origin.

error_chain: Terraform plan/apply runs the graph transform pipeline
AttachSchemaTransformer iterates over providers to attach config schemas
Builtin 'terraform.io/builtin/terraform' provider returns no config schema
AttachSchemaTransformer logs ERROR level message about missing schema
User sees [ERROR] in terraform output even though it's expected behavior
trigger_conditions: Any terraform plan/apply that uses terraform_data or terraform_remote_state resources
The builtin provider is always loaded but has no config schema
TF_LOG=ERROR or higher shows the message
